education.institution: GRADUATE SCHOOL OF MANAGEMENT OF SAINT-PETERSBURG UNIVERSITY

workExperience.position: Real estate sales specialist for German-speaking clients
workExperience.description:
Consistently achieved a 7-10% conversion rate from lead generation to online meetings for 500+ leads.
Arranged and co-hosted 50+ online meetings with real estate investors, leading to 10+ client viewing trips and 3 deals.

Preparing business school students for exams in HRM, Management, Marketing, CSR, etc.
Developed a unique selling proposition (USP) and referral system that attracted 100+ clients with 0 marketing spend.
Achieved 100% exam passing rate among students.
Attained Lifetime Value (LTV) of maximum $1500 and average LTV of $150.

Authored 20+ business plans for Spanish startup visas, adapting business models for the Spanish market, enabling the relocation of 20+ entrepreneurs and their families to Spain.
Attained 95% visa approval rate from ENISA (Spanish visa authorities).
Business plans content: product description, market analysis, monetization strategy, marketing and finance plans.

workExperience.position: Marketing specialist in an Al-powered image-based men's hairstyle selection app
workExperience.description:
Conducted 40+ in-depth Customer Development interviews with business owners and barbershop clients, defining the features and positioning of the final product.
Crafted a detailed business plan and co-developed presentation materials, helping secure $10,000 in funding and achieve a top-15 position in a university startup competition.
